loop.purpose: load repository truth, README, AGENTS, RCC, origin, claim locks
sync canonical runbook and manifest before every full loop
human observer watches status, events, wounds, certificate, git state
worker runs checkers, runtime, validation, ledger, push
run RCC, architecture, README, loopbook, and unit gates
execute local Tessera diagnostic runtime without pip reinstall
validate latest evidence package and transfer certificate
write reports, live state, hashes, lessons, and Loopbook state
commit and push after local gates pass

claim_boundary: Loopbook gate improves repeatability and operator visibility. It does not prove correctness, safety, production readiness, or real telemetry transfer.
